name: Life Cycle Maintenance Cost Calculator
description: Calculates total life cycle maintenance cost based on industrial engineering standards (ISO 15686, Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Acquisition Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total initial cost of acquiring the asset (purchase, installation, commissioning).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total initial cost of acquiring the asset (purchase, installation, commissioning).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın edinilmesi için toplam başlangıç maliyeti (satın alma, kurulum, devreye alma).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Anschaffungskosten des Vermögenswerts (Kauf, Installation, Inbetriebnahme).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût initial total d'acquisition de l'actif (achat, installation, mise en service).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total inicial de adquisición del activo (compra, instalación, puesta en marcha).

inputs.label: Expected Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Planned useful life of the asset per ISO 15686.

businessContext_i18n.en: Planned useful life of the asset per ISO 15686.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 15686'ya göre varlığın planlanan faydalı ömrü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geplante Nutzungsdauer des Vermögenswerts nach ISO 15686.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de vie utile prévue de l'actif selon ISO 15686.
businessContext_i18n.es: Vida útil planificada del activo según ISO 15686.

inputs.label: Maintenance Strategy
inputs.businessContext: Type of maintenance approach (preventive, predictive, reactive).

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of maintenance approach (preventive, predictive, reactive).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Type d'approche de maintenance (préventive, prédictive, réactive).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de enfoque de mantenimiento (preventivo, predictivo, reactivo).

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly cost of maintenance labor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly cost of maintenance labor.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût horaire moyen de la main-d'œuvre de maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio por hora de mano de obra de mantenimiento.

inputs.label: Parts Cost per Incident
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of spare parts per maintenance event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of spare parts per maintenance event.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bakım olayı başına ortalama yedek parça maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten für Ersatzteile pro Wartungsereignis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen des pièces de rechange par événement de maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio de piezas de repuesto por evento de mantenimiento.

inputs.label: Downtime Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Lost revenue or cost per hour of unplanned downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lost revenue or cost per hour of unplanned downtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Plansız duruş saati başına kaybedilen gelir veya maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verlorener Umsatz oder Kosten pro Stunde ungeplanter Stillstandszeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu perdu ou coût par heure d'arrêt non planifié.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos perdidos o costo por hora de inactividad no planificada.
Costo de la electricidad por kilovatio-hora.

rules.message: Expected life must be greater than 0 years.
Annual operating hours must be between 0 and 8760.
Data confidence must be between 0 and 100.

thresholds.message: Total maintenance cost exceeds 50% of acquisition cost. Consider asset replacement or strategy review.
Downtime cost exceeds 30% of total life cycle cost. Investigate reliability improvements.
Data confidence is low. Results may be unreliable. Consider data validation.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
